title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DIKALUNGAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AMPATUAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU SANGKI AMPATUAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 4119 / 59 OG No. 51, 8743 (December 23, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3771, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DIKALUNGAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AMPATUAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU SANGKI AMPATUAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Dikalungan Central Elementary School in the Municipality of Ampatuan, Province of Cotabato, is hereby changed to Datu Sangki Ampatuan Central Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
